generated_oml:
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin representing the vehicle's virtual twin."
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX 2D LiDAR generating point clouds for object segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera capturing RGB‑D images for perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance OnBoardSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board vehicle speed sensor measuring instantaneous velocity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedMeasurementTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance OnBoardSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board steering angle sensor measuring wheel angle for control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleMeasurementTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCameraSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SpeedMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnBoardSpeedSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringAngleMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnBoardSteeringAngleSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data segmented via DBSCAN."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth image data from Intel D435i."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DepthProcessingEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SpeedMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Instantaneous vehicle speed measurement."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringAngleMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Instantaneous steering angle measurement."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleMeasurementTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance TrackedObjectsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked positions and velocities of obstacles via Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DesiredSpeedCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed command generated by ACC logic."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringAngleCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired steering angle command generated by ACC logic."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for raw LiDAR point cloud segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of clustered objects over time."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic computing desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VirtualCockpitRenderingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model of vehicle state for the virtual cockpit."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VirtualCockpitEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PersistentStateStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database model storing vehicle state and track histories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PersistentStorageEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes DBSCAN clustering on LiDAR point cloud."
    DTDFVocab:enables PerceptionProcessingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs Kalman filter tracking of detected obstacles."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrackingProcessingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation onto the cloud server."
    DTDFVocab:enables OFFLOADACCService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VirtualCockpitEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders the virtual cockpit for the user interface."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PersistentStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles persistent storage into the SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:enables StatePersistenceService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DepthProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Preprocesses depth images for perception."
    DTDFVocab:enables DepthProcessingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VehicleStateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes speed & steering data for UI display."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PerceptionProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling clustering & tracking for perception."
    DTDFVocab:provides ClusteredPointCloudInsight, TrackedObjectsInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance TrackingProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transforming tracked objects into actionable paths."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrackedObjectsInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance OFFLOADACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cloud‑offloaded ACC computation service."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedCommandAction, EmergencyBrakeCommandAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service displaying real‑time vehicle state, path, and tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance StatePersistenceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service storing vehicle state and track data into the SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DepthProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling depth image preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:provides DepthImageInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying clustered LiDAR point clouds of obstacles."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance TrackedObjectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing tracked objects over the vehicle’s projected path."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing current vehicle speed and steering angle."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying tracked objects in real time."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DepthImageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of processed depth images for perception."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing stored vehicle state history in the SQL database."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DesiredSpeedCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic desired speed command sent to the ACC controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance EmergencyBrakeCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking command triggered on close obstacle detection."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to enable or disable ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ModifyDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to adjust desired speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual emergency brake command issued via user interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor Actuation FE converting desired speed commands into motor voltage signals for the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Actuation FE translating desired steering angle commands into PWM signals for the vehicle’s steering servo."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance OnboardVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXSensor, IntelD435iDepthCameraSensor, OnBoardSpeedSensor, OnBoardSteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuationFE, SteeringActuationFE, DBSCANClusteringEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, VirtualCockpitEnabler, PersistentStorageEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin outputs ACC control signals (desired speed, steering commands, emergency braking flag) which are transmitted over Wi‑Fi to the vehicle’s on‑board ROS2 network; Data Translation FE deserializes ROS messages into actuator signals, which the Physical Twin Entity propels to the speed controller and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time processing with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms; the Digital Twin synchronizes clocks to within 100 ms accuracy to maintain event order and data integrity across distributed components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247 entity‑based architecture: (1) Physical Twin Entity – handles sensor interfacing and low‑level actuation; (2) Digital Twin Entity – contains data collection, simulation, and ACC computation FEs; (3) User Entity – provides 3D visualization and control panel FEs; (4) Cross‑system Data Translation FE – mediates message serialization between entities; all components run as ROS2 nodes communicating over a shared ROS2 network and Wi‑Fi mesh."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed and developed during the case‑study phase (verification of ACC logic), manufactured the physical vehicle, and currently in the operated stage with real‑time monitoring and remote control; future stages may include maintenance and iterative update via remote management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time data fidelity ensured by 100 ms latency constraint and 100 ms clock synchronization; model validity derived from state‑of‑the‑art perception algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman) and ACC logic compliant with ISO 15622; safety validation via end‑to‑end latency and low‑level actuator command accuracy; no explicit model uncertainty bounds reported."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication inside the DT uses ROS 2 bus (message passing over DDS is implicit in ROS 2), while communication between the PT and DT entities occurs over a Wi‑Fi network. No specific wireless protocols (e.g., 802.11ac) are specified in the document; the connection is described generically as Wi‑Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Edge deployment on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (on‑board) for perception and lightweight control; cloud deployment for Digital Twin Entity services (data storage, UI, ACC computation) hosted on an external server; cross‑system Data Translation FE runs on the vehicle chassis and communicates with cloud via Wi‑Fi."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly described in the provided documents; the architecture is based on ISO 23247 and ROS 2, which are interoperable standards but no external system integration is detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture is employed as the DT backbone; ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622; ROS 2 is used as the middleware. No other specific standards are mentioned."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical constraints include end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms (R7) and 100 ms clock sync (R8); ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622; no explicit cybersecurity mechanisms (authentication, encryption) are specified in the document."
]
